who: field service managers in the construction industry managing 5–15 equipment inspections/month
offer: For field service managers in the construction industry processing 5–15 inspections/month, inefficient scheduling causes compliance delays. We automate scheduling and reporting instead of manual scheduling and reporting processes.
problem: Difficulty in scheduling routine inspections and generating compliance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to field service managers with demo video
Community forums where field service managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual scheduling interface and compliance report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
